product: Genie Space enhancements and bug fixes
tagline: Save visualizations to a dashboard: You can now save Genie Space visualization outputs to a dashboard.
what_it_does: Save visualizations to a dashboard: You can now save Genie Space visualization outputs to a dashboard. Reference previous visualizations: Select and reference visualizations from previous prompts in follow up prompts. Genie Code for metric view export: Use Genie Code when exporting metric views from a Genie Space to refine the metric view definition.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Save visualizations to a dashboard: You can now save Genie Space visualization outputs to a dashboard.
